channel.title: Robotics on Reece Holland
channel.description: Recent content in Robotics on Reece Holland

item.title: Taking CONFIGURED Toward a Release
item.description: A development update on CONFIGURED: a Qt/C++ robotics configuration tool, now packaged for Windows and Ubuntu with documentation, validation, Git workflows, and release assets.

item.title: Building a ROS 2 Fault Injection Framework
item.description: A development update on ros2_fault_injection: typed injectors, YAML scenarios, runtime services, RViz controls, event publishing, and assertion-based fault testing.

item.title: Rugged Rover Update: Real SLAM, Nav2, and a Raspberry Pi 5
item.description: A progress update on the Rugged Rover: Teensy firmware, micro-ROS, RPLIDAR S2, Razor IMU, battery monitoring, SLAM Toolbox, Nav2, and the move to Raspberry Pi 5.

item.title: CONFIGURED
item.description: A C++17 and Qt 6 desktop application for creating, validating, exporting, and Git-managing structured robotics configuration projects.

item.title: ROS 2 Fault Injection
item.description: A ROS 2 fault injection framework for testing robot robustness with configurable odometry, laser scan, IMU, TF, service, and assertion scenarios.

item.title: Rugged Rover
item.description: A ROS 2 autonomous rover platform based on the Lynxmotion A4WD3, Raspberry Pi 5, Teensy 4.1, micro-ROS, SLAM Toolbox, Nav2, RPLIDAR S2, and Unity simulation.

item.title: ROS 2 Motor Control Progress Log — Week in Review
item.description: From hardware setup to working ROS 2 integration, PID tuning, and automated testing — a full update on my rover’s motor control progress.
